<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Tasks\Monitor; use Exception; use Spatie\Backup\Exceptions\InvalidHealthCheck; class HealthCheckFailure { public function __construct( protected HealthCheck $healthCheck, protected Exception $exception ) {} public function healthCheck(): HealthCheck { return $this->healthCheck; } public function exception(): Exception { return $this->exception; } public function wasUnexpected(): bool { return ! $this->exception instanceof InvalidHealthCheck; } }
